plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Summary

### Root Cause
Classic off-by-one error in `src/utils.ts`, line 7:

```typescript
// BUGGY — stops one iteration too early
for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++) {
```

The `- 1` means for an N-element array the loop only visits indices `0 … N-2`, silently dropping the last item.

### The Fix — single character change
```typescript
// FIXED
for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
```

### Files to touch
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/utils.ts` | Remove `- 1` from the loop condition (line 7) |
| `tests/utils.test.ts` | **No changes needed** — tests already cover the failing cases |

### Test status
3 of the 4 existing `processItems` tests are currently **failing** because of this bug. After the one-line fix, all tests will pass.
